missions.title: Rotational Motion - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering centre of mass, COM of two particles, COM of rigid body and more.

microtargets.title: Centre of mass
ncertAnchors: NCERT Physics Class 11, Centre of mass
mustKnowFacts: Centre of mass is a fundamental subtopic of Rotational Motion.

commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Centre of mass during complex MCQs.

pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Centre of mass.
